tasks.label: Git: Create Branch from Selection
tasks.command: SELECTED="${selectedText}"; CLEANED=$(echo $SELECTED | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/ /-/g' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9-]//g'); git checkout -b "feature/$CLEANED"
tasks.detail: Creates a kebab-case feature branch from the text currently selected in your Markdown file.
